gate.note: Minkowski limit (R_dS=inf) must reproduce E6b before any curved verdict.

verdict: SUCCESS: spatial curvature OPENS the magnetic sector -- the B-type (spacelike) fraction exceeds 0.01 with significance (Wilson-lo 0.0105 > 0.01) at R_dS≈1.68 (Rhat=2), h=4. Largest curvature radius that still works = the BD-photon 'curvature radius'. E6 advances past [FRONTEIRA-TECNICA].
